Most popular games
  • Ai Hero
    Ai Hero is a multiplayer battle royale text adventure game that combines GPT technology, machine learning technology, and artificial intelligence drawing technology.
  • Project Matthew
    Project Matthew is a strategy & simulation management game, an exciting and immersive sci-fi experience that allows players to build their own space station, recruit powerful robot soldiers, and explore the vast expanse of the universe.
  • CyberChess
    CyberChess is a fast-paced PvP & P2E strategy based auto battler GameFi from BinaryX. Assemble a party of 8 heroes from a random pool and battle it out with other players.
  • CyberDragon
    CyberDragon is an online game based on BNB Smart Chain (BSC). Players can recruit heroes, challenge dungeons, build up their heroes' levels, and loot rare items. The final challenge is to defeat the ultimate boss, the Cyber Dragon.
Bringing The World To BinaryX
IGO Projects

Discover new games to play, invest, & earn

Explore New Projects

BinaryX is a leading developer of innovative Web3 games, crafting high-action, thrilling experiences that prioritize both engaging gameplay and rewarding tokenomics.

Our portfolio includes top titles like AI Hero, Pancake Mayor, CyberChess, and CyberDragon, each designed to provide an immersive and exciting Web3 gaming experience.

BinaryX

Game Development

Fully self-sufficient development team comprising of designers, programmers and testers; delivering games that offer exciting gameplay, vivid in-game graphics, and high earning potential.

IGO Launchpad

Fundraising platform with expertise in marketing, tokenomic re-modelling and design, and exposure to over 100,000 BNX token holders.

Asset Marketplace

Multi-asset marketplace powered by BNX for users to trade NFTs on a fully decentralized platform

BNX Utilities

Need not worry about any possible issues with your game's integration with blockchain.

  • Integrated Community

    Interact directly with our project members and other BNX holders through our DAO, social and community channels.

  • Always On

    Use BNX for a variety of in-game consumption scenarios, supported by 24/7 fast transaction times and low gas fees.

  • Immersive Gameplay

    Unleash your inner child and experience the worlds brought to life by the best gaming projects with BNX.
